Public Remarks: Established retail and service business opportunity in high-traffic Gulf to Bay corridor. Turn-key operation with loyal customer base. Current owner operated for 12 years. Full equipment inventory included. Long-term assignable lease at below-market rate. Revenue and financial statements available to qualified buyers under NDA.
Directions: From US-19 head west on Gulf to Bay Blvd. Property is on the south side approximately 0.3 miles past the intersection of Highland Ave. Parking in front.
